name: On Time Limousine

name: Best Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: Cleveland Metropolitan School District (alt transport for some students); elderly/medical NEMT customers
recent_news: Operating as 'The Best Transportation and Home Care Service LLC' (a.k.a. The Best Transportation Services LLC), founded ~2008 in Cleveland by Bettye Bess. Provides NEMT plus alternative student transport for CMSD; no M&A news identified.
fit_notes: Marginal tuck-in. Operates as a tiny NEMT / alt-student-transport van operator rather than a yellow-bus contractor. Could appeal as a small SPED/alt-transport bolt-on for Summit in Cleveland, but scale is sub-scale and revenue likely under $1M; succession possible given owner tenure since 2008.

name: Central Ohio Transportation

Address (580 E 200th St #202, Cleveland, OH 44119) and phone (216) 531-5280 are shared with 'Cheerful Transportation' (rank 2857), suggesting a shared suite of small alt-transport van operators or possible same-operator DBAs.
fit_notes: Not a credible standalone tuck-in. Three-employee micro operator co-located with at least one other similarly small van service; even consolidated, scale is far below Summit's tuck-in threshold.
